title: The Cost of Defeat on Winner Island
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, World Government, Unknown person #8, Blackbeard, Unknown person #9, Kuzan as The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.
scene: The aftermath of Law’s clash with Blackbeard connects to Kuzan’s role in the Blackbeard Pirates and the danger surrounding Garp’s rescue mission.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MU HE HE HE HE'S SPEAKING OF INJURIES...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Commodore, Dya reckon this guy has info on the man marked by flames?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: marked by flames?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are four super valuable red poneglyphs out there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kaido and big mom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Apparently have one each.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means two of 'em are up for grabs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But there's no known' where they are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We heard a rumor that the man marked by flames has one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I do...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not you!! You only got that scar recently!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GLUG--Ah GA GA GA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ho ho ho ho ho ho ho, it is said that man can be found on a pitch black ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if anyone sails near, they end up swallowed by giant whirlpools!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may very well have a fruit power.

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: I bet he's with the government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all know they're hardly angels...!! It wouldn't be surprising if they kept a stone or two for themselves...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a surefire way of preventing any pirate from ever claiming the one piece...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the poneglyphs hold nothing but bitter memories for me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't remember seeing any giant garish red stone at Ohara.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What I do remember is a dear friend taking a stand against the government...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and the traumatized eyes of a little girl...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that forced me to take fate into my own hands...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's with the sob story?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Commo- Dore, what do you want to do?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His power could be quite useful, should we steal it...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can hear you, asshole!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll send you all back to the ice age!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I heard you were hunting devil fruits!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bring it on!!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: Hang on, Kuzan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My pal's just bein' an idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wasn't plain' on doin' that. In fact...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How would you like to join our grew?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Cap'n?! are you nuts?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're basically out of a job, right? Got any other prospects?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Guardians of 'Justige' dumped you, so what's next?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y'know, I live by a different definition of 'justice'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Don't be a moron!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You can't think a couple of drinks..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...is enough to win me over?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey! Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You've got pirates all wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We ain't just a Merry Band of Chums Bumming around together!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all profit from having our own agendas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's what makes us pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You're free now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So what do you wanna do?

summary: This part advances the Winner Island and Hachinosu Fallout through 49 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
